title: schoenus laevinux
intro: Schoenus laevinux, also known as the 'Rough Tussock-grass', is a type of sedge that belongs to the Cyperaceae family. It is native to Australia and is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive problems, due to its health benefits of reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system. Schoenus laevinux can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
